sprint: Museum Gallery Fidelity Trace — real .vtheme surfaces two silent crashes
task: Re-traced the Theme Fidelity Pass acceptance journey using the REAL themes/MuseumGallery.vtheme loaded through the real ThemeEngine.importThemeFile import path, not a synthetic fixture. Found and fixed two real, previously-invisible bugs: (1) a genuine crash -- 'Cannot read properties of null (reading variants)' in js/themeEngine.js's _defaultOptionsFor, reached whenever no Story Theme is active (a real, disclosed state: Studio ships zero built-in themes today, and a pure Artwork-only World like Museum Gallery never applies one) -- silently swallowed by defensive try/catch blocks everywhere, leaving the canvas blank and Object Strip showing 'Nothing on this page yet' with zero console errors. Fixed by normalizing a null theme in _defaultOptionsFor/resolveTheme and adding the same try/catch+fallback pattern renderer/slideRenderer.js's buildPayload was missing. (2) The 'handle' Layer Pack entry (no decoration payload, a position field) fell through to a default spotlight glow and a nonsensical 'Handle' Object Strip card, violating docs/THEME_PROJECT_SPEC.md's own documented 'declarative-only' contract for position-carrier entries; fixed in _layerDrawDecoration without affecting gallery-spotlight's real, intentional glow. See docs/CREATOR_THEME_FIDELITY.md's new Addendum and CLAUDE.md's matching entry for the full account.
